Event:

Sage Bot Item Code: A101


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Precious Egg

Triggers: Once in a while

Meteorites of Ice and Fire
Fire meteorites fall on 2 of the closest enemies, and ice meteorites fall on 2 of the farthest enemies. One of the following effects is triggered depending on the type of meteorite:
- Fire meteorite deal 60000 magic damage and set the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 60000 damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.
- Ice meteorites deal 60000 magic damage and freeze the target. While frozen, they are unable to move or attack for 1.5 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target's gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1.5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
